title: Phase 1: Define canonical materialized transaction state schema
summary: Specify the 0.4.0 canonical materialized transaction state schema, including fields, types, invariants, and integrity model.
acceptance_criteria: Schema includes top-level fields: schema_version, active_tx, last_applied_seq, integrity, updated_at.
active_tx includes tx_id, ticket_id, status, phase, current_step, last_completed_step, next_action, verify_state, commit_state, file_intents.
file_intents items include path, operation, purpose, state, last_event_seq, and planned_step reference.
Integrity model specifies state_hash and rebuilt_from_seq semantics.
Document lists invariants and validation rules tied to the schema.
Output is suitable to be referenced by implementation and tests.

steps.description: Define schema fields and types for materialized transaction state.
Document file intent structure and lifecycle states.
Specify integrity checks and hash/cursor semantics.

notes: Keep schema compact but complete; align with 0.4.0 breaking redesign.
This ticket is schema-spec only; no runtime changes.
